rows.label: qev090803_MSG0002
rows.name:
They look nearly ready
to strike the caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090803_MSG0003
rows.name:
Thankfully, we're completely
ready. Let's make this quick.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090803_MSG0004
rows.name:
I knew the Bias had superhuman
strength, but that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090803_MSG0005
rows.name:
If you hadn't been with me, I
fear I would have...well, died.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090803_MSG0006
rows.name:
You have my thanks. Now let's
hurry back and inform Pulala.[ST:wait ]
